title: The Flow of Exception Handling with 'throws' in Java
description: This flowchart illustrates how the 'throws' keyword propagates a checked exception from a method to its caller, showing the decision points for handling or further propagation.
relationships: Method A declares it can throw an exception
Method B calls Method A, forcing it to handle or declare the exception
Method B uses a try-catch block to handle the exception
If uncaught, the exception propagates to the JVM which terminates the program
